name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.5: stop upgrade.php from accidentally uninstalling the plugin. require_once'ing install.php/uninstall.php for their helpers used to also run their CLI bodies, so every event/disks_mounted fire silently stripped the chrome. CLI guards now require the file to be the entry script.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
